productDisplayName: Spice Art Women Cherry Maroon Clutch
description: Look your glamorous best with this spice art clutch, customised for the ethnic diva in you. Show off your traditional side with this piece, which is as functional as it is fashionable. Width: 27 cm Height: 12 cm Made of synthetic leather with a nylon inner lining A flap with a magnetic clasp to secure the sides of the clutch Synthetic leather tassels on the end of the flap Herringbone pattern lace-up decoration on the flap One main compartment with a magnetic clasp A zippered compartment and a mobile pouch inside the main compartment Care Wipe surface with a damp clean cloth
